title: CB Central Recovery Lane
description: You are the central centre-back after a midfield turnover. Recover quickly to close the central transition lane.
teaching_point: Sprint first to central protection, then adjust to the ball once the lane is blocked.

feedback_hints.success: You recovered centrally and delayed the opponent's direct transition route.
feedback_hints.common_error: You chased the ball line and left the center exposed.
feedback_hints.teaching_emphasis: In transition, protect the middle first before pressing wide.
success_points: You recovered into the most dangerous central lane immediately.
Your run restored compactness between midfield and back line.
error_points: Your recovery path was too ball-focused and not lane-focused.
The opponent could play directly through the center behind you.
alternate_points: A staggered central-right recovery can still work if teammate pressure is immediate.
